info.title: WebApplicationFirewallManagement
info.description: APIs to manage web application firewall rules.

get.description: Gets all the Firewall Policies in a subscription.
Lists all Firewall Policies in a resource group.

parameters.name: firewallPolicyName
parameters.description: The name of the Firewall Policy.

parameters.name: $expand
parameters.description: Expands referenced resources.

put.description: Creates or updates the specified Firewall Policy.

parameters.name: firewallPolicyName
parameters.description: The name of the Firewall Policy.

parameters.name: parameters
parameters.description: Parameters supplied to the create or update Firewall Policy operation.

Azure-AsyncOperation.description: A link to the status monitor

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

patch.description: Updates tags of a Azure Firewall Policy resource.

parameters.name: firewallPolicyName
parameters.description: The name of the Firewall Policy.

parameters.name: parameters
parameters.description: Parameters supplied to update Azure Firewall Policy tags.

parameters.name: firewallPolicyName
parameters.description: The name of the Firewall Policy.

Location.description: The Location header contains the URL where the status of the long running operation can be checked.

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

parameters.description: The name of the Firewall Policy.

parameters.description: Will contain all properties of the object to put

patch.description: Will update the status of policy's signature overrides for IDPS

parameters.name: firewallPolicyName
parameters.description: The name of the Firewall Policy.

parameters.name: parameters
parameters.description: Will contain all properties of the object to put

sourceAddresses.description: List of source IP addresses for this rule.

destinationAddresses.description: List of destination IP addresses or Service Tags.

targetFqdns.description: List of FQDNs for this rule.

targetUrls.description: List of Urls for this rule condition.

fqdnTags.description: List of FQDN Tags for this rule.

sourceIpGroups.description: List of source IpGroups for this rule.

terminateTLS.description: Terminate TLS connections for this rule.

webCategories.description: List of destination azure web categories.

httpHeadersToInsert.description: List of HTTP/S headers to insert.

DnsSettings.description: DNS Proxy Settings in Firewall Policy.

enableProxy.description: Enable DNS Proxy on Firewalls attached to the Firewall Policy.

requireProxyForNetworkRules.description: FQDNs in Network Rules are supported when set to true.

ExplicitProxy.description: Explicit Proxy Settings in Firewall Policy.

enableExplicitProxy.description: When set to true, explicit proxy mode is enabled.

httpPort.description: Port number for explicit proxy http protocol, cannot be greater than 64000.

httpsPort.description: Port number for explicit proxy https protocol, cannot be greater than 64000.

enablePacFile.description: When set to true, pac file port and url needs to be provided.

pacFilePort.description: Port number for firewall to serve PAC file.

FilterItems.description: Will contain the filter name and values to operate on

field.description: The name of the field we would like to filter

values.description: List of values to filter the current field by

etag.description: A unique read-only string that changes whenever the resource is updated.

identity.description: The identity of the firewall policy.

FirewallPolicyCertificateAuthority.description: Trusted Root certificates properties for tls.

keyVaultSecretId.description: Secret Id of (base-64 encoded unencrypted pfx) 'Secret' or 'Certificate' object stored in KeyVault.

basePolicy.description: The parent firewall policy from which rules are inherited.

threatIntelMode.description: The operation mode for Threat Intelligence.

snat.description: The private IP addresses/IP ranges to which traffic will not be SNAT.

action.description: The action type of a Filter rule collection.

rules.description: List of rules included in a rule collection.

FirewallPolicyHttpHeaderToInsert.description: name and value of HTTP/S header to insert

headerName.description: Contains the name of the header

headerValue.description: Contains the value of the header

isEnabled.description: A flag to indicate if the insights are enabled on the policy.

retentionDays.description: Number of days the insights should be enabled on the policy.

logAnalyticsResources.description: Workspaces needed to configure the Firewall Policy Insights.

FirewallPolicyIntrusionDetection.description: Configuration for intrusion detection mode and rules.

mode.description: Intrusion detection general state. When attached to a parent policy, the firewall's effective IDPS mode is the stricter mode of the two.

profile.description: IDPS profile name. When attached to a parent policy, the firewall's effective profile is the profile name of the parent policy.

name.description: Name of the bypass traffic rule.

description.description: Description of the bypass traffic rule.

sourceAddresses.description: List of source IP addresses or ranges for this rule.

destinationAddresses.description: List of destination IP addresses or ranges for this rule.

destinationPorts.description: List of destination ports or ranges.

sourceIpGroups.description: List of source IpGroups for this rule.

destinationIpGroups.description: List of destination IpGroups for this rule.

FirewallPolicyIntrusionDetectionConfigur.description: The operation for configuring intrusion detection.

bypassTrafficSettings.description: List of rules for traffic to bypass.

privateRanges.description: IDPS Private IP address ranges are used to identify traffic direction (i.e. inbound, outbound, etc.). By default, only ranges defined by IANA RFC 1918 are considered private IP addresses. To modify default ranges, specify your Private IP address ranges with this property

FirewallPolicyListResult.description: The response of a FirewallPolicy list operation.

value.description: The FirewallPolicy items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

FirewallPolicyLogAnalyticsResources.description: Log Analytics Resources for Firewall Policy Insights.

workspaces.description: List of workspaces for Firewall Policy Insights.

defaultWorkspaceId.description: The default workspace Id for Firewall Policy Insights.

FirewallPolicyLogAnalyticsWorkspace.description: Log Analytics Workspace for Firewall Policy Insights.

workspaceId.description: The workspace Id for Firewall Policy Insights.

action.description: The action type of a Nat rule collection.

rules.description: List of rules included in a rule collection.

size.description: A read-only string that represents the size of the FirewallPolicyPropertiesFormat in MB. (ex 0.5MB)

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the firewall policy resource.

basePolicy.description: The parent firewall policy from which rules are inherited.

firewalls.description: List of references to Azure Firewalls that this Firewall Policy is associated with.

childPolicies.description: List of references to Child Firewall Policies.

threatIntelMode.description: The operation mode for Threat Intelligence.

snat.description: The private IP addresses/IP ranges to which traffic will not be SNAT.

FirewallPolicyRuleApplicationProtocol.description: Properties of the application rule protocol.

port.description: Port number for the protocol, cannot be greater than 64000.

ruleCollectionType.description: The type of the rule collection.

name.description: The name of the rule collection.

priority.description: Priority of the Firewall Policy Rule Collection resource.

properties.description: The properties of the firewall policy rule collection group.

etag.description: A unique read-only string that changes whenever the resource is updated.

properties.description: The properties of the firewall policy rule collection group.

FirewallPolicyRuleCollectionGroupDraftPr.description: Properties of the rule collection group draft.

size.description: A read-only string that represents the size of the FirewallPolicyRuleCollectionGroupProperties in MB. (ex 1.2MB)

priority.description: Priority of the Firewall Policy Rule Collection Group resource.

ruleCollections.description: Group of Firewall Policy rule collections.

FirewallPolicyRuleCollectionGroupListRes.description: The response of a FirewallPolicyRuleCollectionGroup list operation.

value.description: The FirewallPolicyRuleCollectionGroup items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

FirewallPolicyRuleCollectionGroupPropert.description: Properties of the rule collection group.

size.description: A read-only string that represents the size of the FirewallPolicyRuleCollectionGroupProperties in MB. (ex 1.2MB)

priority.description: Priority of the Firewall Policy Rule Collection Group resource.

ruleCollections.description: Group of Firewall Policy rule collections.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the firewall policy rule collection group resource.

FirewallPolicySNAT.description: The private IP addresses/IP ranges to which traffic will not be SNAT.

privateRanges.description: List of private IP addresses/IP address ranges to not be SNAT.

autoLearnPrivateRanges.description: The operation mode for automatically learning private ranges to not be SNAT

allowSqlRedirect.description: A flag to indicate if SQL Redirect traffic filtering is enabled. Turning on the flag requires no rule using port 11000-11999.

ipAddresses.description: List of IP addresses for the ThreatIntel Whitelist.

fqdns.description: List of FQDNs for the ThreatIntel Whitelist.

FirewallPolicyTransportSecurity.description: Configuration needed to perform TLS termination & initiation.

certificateAuthority.description: The CA used for intermediate CA generation.

IDPSQueryObject.description: Will describe the query to run against the IDPS signatures DB

filters.description: Contain all filters names and values

resultsPerPage.description: The number of the results to return in each page

skip.description: The number of records matching the filter to skip

sourceAddresses.description: List of source IP addresses for this rule.

destinationAddresses.description: List of destination IP addresses or Service Tags.

translatedAddress.description: The translated address for this NAT rule.

translatedPort.description: The translated port for this NAT rule.

sourceIpGroups.description: List of source IpGroups for this rule.

translatedFqdn.description: The translated FQDN for this NAT rule.

sourceAddresses.description: List of source IP addresses for this rule.

destinationAddresses.description: List of destination IP addresses or Service Tags.

sourceIpGroups.description: List of source IpGroups for this rule.

destinationIpGroups.description: List of destination IpGroups for this rule.

field.description: Describes the actual column name to sort by

order.description: Describes if results should be in ascending/descending order

matchingRecordsCount.description: Number of total records matching the query.

signatures.description: Array containing the results of the query

SignatureOverridesFilterValuesQuery.description: Describes the filter values possibles for a given column

filterName.description: Describes the name of the column which values will be returned

SignatureOverridesFilterValuesResponse.description: Describes the list of all possible values for a specific filter value

SignaturesOverrides.description: Contains all specific policy signatures overrides for the IDPS

properties.description: Will contain the properties of the resource (the actual signature overrides)

SignaturesOverridesList.description: Describes an object containing an array with a single item

value.description: Describes a list consisting exactly one item describing the policy's signature override status

SignaturesOverridesProperties.description: Will contain the properties of the resource (the actual signature overrides)

mode.description: The current mode enforced, 0 - Disabled, 1 - Alert, 2 -Deny

severity.description: Describes the severity of signature: 1 - High, 2 - Medium, 3 - Low

direction.description: Describes in which direction signature is being enforced: 0 - OutBound, 1 - InBound, 2 - Any, 3 - Internal, 4 - InternalOutbound, 5 - InternalInbound

group.description: Describes the groups the signature belongs to

description.description: Describes what is the signature enforces

protocol.description: Describes the protocol the signatures is being enforced in

sourcePorts.description: Describes the list of source ports related to this signature

destinationPorts.description: Describes the list of destination ports related to this signature

lastUpdated.description: Describes the last updated time of the signature (provided from 3rd party vendor)

inheritedFromParentPolicy.description: Describes if this override is inherited from base policy or not
